title: I Tried the Open Source ElevenLabs Alternative (Voicebox)
summary: Voicebox is an open-source desktop application that provides voice cloning, text-to-speech, system-wide dictation, and local REST API capabilities. The video reviews Voicebox as a privacy-focused local alternative to cloud services like ElevenLabs, with support for MCP integration and Stories editing.
writeup: The video reviews Voicebox, an open-source desktop application positioned as a local alternative to cloud services like ElevenLabs. It covers the app's core features: voice cloning, text-to-speech, system-wide dictation, and a local REST API. The privacy angle comes from running locally rather than sending audio to cloud providers. Additional capabilities noted include Model Context Protocol integration and Stories editing.
